title: Supreme Court to hear TVK MLA Sethupathi’s plea over trust vote on May 13
description: A High Court order, based on a petition filed by DMK’s K.R. Periakaruppan, who lost to Sethupathi by the margin of a single vote, restrains the TVK MLA from voting in the confidence motion scheduled to take place in the T.N. Assembly in less than the next 24 hours
